festivals.name: Bonhomie (Fuerza)
festivals.description: The premier annual inter-collegiate festival at AIKTC that consolidates sports, cultural, and technical events into a week-long celebration. Organized by the Council of Students (COST), it draws wide participation across Mumbai and Navi Mumbai.

clubs.name: Film Club
clubs.description: Organizes short-filmmaking workshops, screenings, and visual production seminars.

clubs.name: Art Club
clubs.description: Coordinates visual arts showcases, sketching competitions, and local crafts exhibitions.

clubs.name: Literature and Music Club
clubs.description: Organizes open-mic debates, literature panels, and campus acoustic jam sessions.

clubs.name: Theatre and Fashion Club
clubs.description: Hosts street plays (Nukkad Natak), drama rehearsals, and styling sessions.

competitions.name: Algorithm Hackathon
competitions.description: A 32-hour continuous national hackathon where students code and solve industrial and social problem statements. E.g., Algorithm 8.0 (held in March 2024) and Algorithm 7.0 (held in March 2023).

competitions.name: Nexathon
competitions.description: An intensive machine learning and analytical data hackathon challenging teams to develop predictive models from massive datasets. Flagship event held on October 18, 2025.

competitions.name: TechnoScope
competitions.description: A national-level project competition for final-year engineering students to showcase their research, capstone engineering projects, and working models to industry judges.

competitions.name: TechSprint
competitions.description: A fast-paced virtual hackathon challenging teams to build functional digital solutions within a tight deadline.

committees.name: Council of Students Committee (COST) / Student Council
committees.description: COST is the apex student body responsible for organizing campus fests, coordinating student feedback, and acting as the official liaison between students and campus management.

committees.name: Centre for Sports & Fitness (SFC)
committees.description: Manages gymkhana facilities, indoor and outdoor game spaces, coordinates athletic training, and represents the campus in University of Mumbai sports meets.
achievements: Ms. Anam won the Best Fielder Award in Nari Shakti Chashak 2024 (Women Box Cricket).
Mr. Saqlain Adhikari won the District Cricket Championship (2024).
Yadav Snehlata Rajnish Prasad (1st Sem, Data Science) won Gold (1st Rank) in Hammer Throw Event at University of Mumbai Inter Collegiate Athletic Meet 2024-25 Mumbai City Zone (Women).
Yadav Snehlata Rajnish Prasad represented Mumbai City Zone in Inter Zonal Athletic Competition 2024-25 (University of Mumbai) and secured 4th Rank.
Iman Navdekar, Mrunal Bhosale, Yadav Snehlata, Sarosh Mapkar, Mahek Bagdadi won 3rd Rank in Naari Shakti Chashak 2024 Women Box Cricket Tournament (District Level).
Iman Navdekar, Mrunal Bhosale, Yadav Snehlata, Sarosh Mapkar, Mahek Bagdadi secured 6th Rank in University of Mumbai Mumbai City Zone Inter Collegiate Volleyball Tournament 2024-25 (Women).
Bagdadi Mahek and Siddiqui Khadija won 4th and 6th Rank in Javelin Throw Event (University of Mumbai Inter Collegiate Athletic Meet 2024-25 Mumbai City Zone (Women)).
Bagdadi Mahek secured 8th Rank in Shot Put Event (University of Mumbai Inter Collegiate Athletic Meet 2024-25 Mumbai City Zone (Women)).
Yadav Snehlata won 1st Place in Discus Throw and 1st Place in Shotput at AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet (February 5, 2025).
Bagdadi Mahek won 2nd Prize in Shotput at AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet (February 5, 2025).
Volleyball (Women) - 1st in Volleyball won by Mrunal Bhosale, Iman Navdekar, Javeriya Sayyed, Rida Dhanse, Muskan Qazi, Snehlata Yadav (AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet, February 2, 2025).

Throwball (Women) - 1st in Throwball won by Mrunal Bhosale, Iman Navdekar, Ammara Bandarkar, Snehlata Yadav, Javeriya Sayyed, Bushra Kazi, Mahek Bagdadi, Yamana Mahimkar (AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet, February 1, 2025).
Football (Women) - 1st in Football won by Mrunal Bhosale, Iman Navdekar, Binish Gandhi, Nashra Shaikh, Javeriya Sayyed, Snehlata Yadav (AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet, February 1, 2025).
Nakade Anas Aslam won 2nd prize in Pushups (AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet, February 5, 2025).
Khan Deshmukh Maryam Mohd Rafi won 2nd prize in Chess (AIKTC Inter-Department Sports Meet, February 6, 2025).

committees.name: Centre for NSS (National Service Scheme) and Extension Activities
committees.description: Promotes community development, blood donation drives, health camps, and hosts the NSS 7-Day Residential Camp.

Safai Apnao Bimari Bhagao Abhiyan- Clean cities healthy citizens

committees.name: Women Development and Grievance Cell (WDGC)
committees.description: Ensures gender parity, coordinates sensitization seminars, and addresses grievances.

events.name: Independence Day Celebration & Poster Making Competition
Workshop on Self Defence for Female Students & Faculty
Poster Making Competition on Equal Opportunities

committees.name: Student Grievance Redressal Committee (SGRC)
committees.description: Provides a formal channel for students to register grievances and request administrative reviews. Includes online application and form submission.

committees.name: Equal Opportunity Cell
committees.description: Promotes equality and inclusivity on campus, ensuring support and representation for students from all sections of society.

committees.name: Student Mentoring and Counselling Centre
committees.description: Focuses on the mental health, soft skills, and academic guidance of students through mentoring programs and workshops.

events.name: RoadMap to GATE Competitive Exam Preparation

committees.name: Internal Complaints Committee (ICC)
committees.description: Responsible for preventing, prohibiting, and redressing sexual harassment of women at the campus, maintaining a safe workplace and academic environment.
